docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, DOUGLAS , AS RECEIVER FOR PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACEVEDO, DONIS LUNA, HUMBERT ARAQUE, LUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 CHUMASERO DRIVE, #6J SAN FRANCISCO CA 94132 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77978847)
